draft:
Dear Sir or Madam:

I am writing to provide my strongest recommendation for Mr. Rohan Singh’s O-1A visa petition. As the CEO of Zenith Ventures, I have had the opportunity to work closely with Mr. Singh and have been consistently impressed by his extraordinary abilities and achievements in the field of deep technology and entrepreneurship.

To provide some background, I am the CEO of Zenith Ventures, a company that provides comprehensive services for setting up and managing LLCs. Our offerings include U.S. bank account setup, tax filing, and more, designed to simplify the process of starting and managing a business. Prior to my role at Zenith Ventures, I gained extensive experience in the tech industry through various positions at CloudSync. From August 2016 to April 2019, I served as a Product Manager and Growth Analyst, focusing on product safety and business development. This experience honed my skills in product development, team leadership, and strategic growth.

My educational background includes a dual degree from Columbia University, where I earned a Bachelor of Science in Statistics from the Business School and a Bachelor of Arts in Mathematics from the College of Arts and Sciences. This strong academic foundation, combined with my professional experience, has equipped me with a deep understanding of the startup ecosystem and the qualities needed for success in this field.

In addition to my role at Zenith Ventures, I have been actively involved in the entrepreneurial community through various initiatives. I served as a Fellow at Startup Hub from June 2019 to August 2019, where I engaged with a network of ambitious founders and professionals. I also gained valuable experience as a Teaching Assistant at the Business School from December 2015 to May 2016, where I assisted in courses on venture capital and entrepreneurial management. These experiences have further solidified my ability to mentor and support emerging entrepreneurs.

I have also hosted the 15-minute founder podcast, where I engage with and learn from other entrepreneurs, and I have developed a diverse skill set in areas such as research, public speaking, data analysis, leadership, and marketing. This broad range of experiences and skills has enabled me to effectively mentor and support emerging entrepreneurs like Mr. Singh.

I first became acquainted with Mr. Singh through his startup, EcoFusion, which specializes in developing advanced carbon capture technology. As the Founder and CEO, Mr. Singh has demonstrated remarkable leadership and technical prowess in driving the company’s mission to reduce carbon emissions and combat climate change. His innovative approach and dedication to sustainability have made a lasting impression on me.

Under Mr. Singh’s leadership, EcoFusion has achieved significant milestones in the field of carbon capture technology. The company has developed a groundbreaking 1 Ton Per Day Carbon Capture Plant that offers a 55% reduction in CapEx and OpEx compared to traditional technologies. This innovative solution enables industrial emitters to reduce their carbon emissions profitably, showcasing Mr. Singh’s ability to create impactful and scalable solutions.

The success of EcoFusion has been further validated by the company’s impressive client roster, which includes industry giants such as Bharat Petroleum, L&T Infotech, and PowerGrid India. Securing contracts with these major players is a testament to the effectiveness and market demand for EcoFusion’s technology. Mr. Singh’s ability to attract and retain such high-profile clients speaks volumes about his leadership and the trust he has built within the industry.

Mr. Singh’s technical expertise and innovative mindset have been instrumental in EcoFusion’s achievements. His deep understanding of carbon capture technology and his ability to translate complex concepts into practical, market-ready solutions have been key drivers of the company’s success. Mr. Singh’s vision and commitment to sustainability have positioned EcoFusion as a leader in the field, making significant strides in the fight against climate change.

Beyond his technical skills, Mr. Singh has demonstrated exceptional leadership and business acumen. He has successfully built and led a talented team, fostering a culture of innovation and excellence within EcoFusion. His strategic thinking and ability to navigate complex challenges have been critical in driving the company’s growth and securing its position as a trusted partner for major industrial clients.

Mr. Singh’s achievements with EcoFusion are a testament to his extraordinary abilities as an entrepreneur and innovator. His work is not only advancing the field of carbon capture technology but also making a tangible impact in the global effort to reduce carbon emissions. Mr. Singh’s dedication to sustainability and his ability to deliver groundbreaking solutions make him an invaluable asset to the industry and a role model for aspiring entrepreneurs.

In addition to his work with EcoFusion, Mr. Singh has made significant contributions to the broader startup ecosystem through his role as a judge and mentor. He has been selected as a judge for several prestigious competitions and incubators, where he evaluates and supports early-stage startups. These roles have allowed him to share his expertise and provide valuable guidance to emerging entrepreneurs, further demonstrating his commitment to fostering innovation and supporting the next generation of leaders.

Mr. Singh's involvement in these initiatives highlights his ability to recognize and nurture promising talent, as well as his dedication to giving back to the entrepreneurial community. His insights and feedback have been instrumental in helping startups refine their business models, develop their technologies, and navigate the challenges of scaling their ventures. Mr. Singh's contributions as a judge and mentor have had a lasting impact on the startups he has worked with, helping them to achieve their goals and make meaningful progress in their respective fields.

In conclusion, Mr. Singh's extraordinary abilities as an entrepreneur and innovator have been instrumental in the success of EcoFusion and his impactful contributions to the broader startup ecosystem. His technical expertise, visionary leadership, and unwavering commitment to sustainability have positioned EcoFusion as a leader in carbon capture technology, securing high-profile clients and making significant strides in the fight against climate change. Beyond his achievements with EcoFusion, Mr. Singh has demonstrated a deep commitment to fostering innovation and supporting the next generation of entrepreneurs through his roles as a judge and mentor. His ability to recognize and nurture promising talent, along with his dedication to giving back to the entrepreneurial community, has had a lasting impact on the startups he has worked with.

I have no doubt that Mr. Singh will continue to make significant contributions to the field of carbon capture technology and the startup ecosystem as a whole. His extraordinary abilities, coupled with his passion for sustainability and innovation, make him an invaluable asset to any organization or initiative he is involved with. I wholeheartedly support Mr. Singh's O-1A visa petition and am confident that he will continue to drive positive change and make meaningful advancements in the United States.

Sincerely,

Rahul Raman

CEO

Zenith Ventures
final:
To Whom It May Concern,

I am delighted to offer my highest recommendation for Mr. Rohan Singh. Having collaborated closely with him, I have been continually amazed by his exceptional talents and remarkable accomplishments within the realms of emerging technology and entrepreneurship.

As the Founder & CEO of VentureBox.com, my mission has been to help a billion people start their dream businesses by providing a seamless “business-in-a-box” solution for LLCs. Prior to founding VentureBox, I worked at CloudSync, where I began in the Data & Analytics team before transitioning to Product Manager on the Growth team, focusing on driving user acquisition and retention. My earlier experiences include institutional equity sales and trading at Hudson Capital, serving as a finance research intern at the Columbia Public Policy Initiative, and holding various roles in sales, marketing, and education. These diverse experiences have shaped my ability to understand different industries, communicate effectively, and develop growth-driven strategies, all fueled by my passion for entrepreneurship and product development. This background enables me to recognize impactful leaders like Mr. Singh, who excels in creating solutions that simplify business formation and make it more accessible globally.

I was introduced to Mr. Rohan Singh through his groundbreaking work at EcoFusion, a startup at the forefront of developing cutting-edge carbon capture technology. As the Founder and CEO, Mr. Singh has demonstrated unparalleled leadership and technical acumen in advancing the company's mission to significantly reduce carbon emissions and tackle climate change challenges. His innovative vision and unwavering commitment to sustainability have propelled EcoFusion to new heights and left a lasting impression on all who collaborate with him. His ability to blend technical expertise with forward-thinking strategies has been pivotal in establishing EcoFusion's competitive advantage within the industry.

Under Mr. Singh's adept leadership, EcoFusion has achieved notable milestones in carbon capture technology. The development of a pioneering 1 Ton Per Day Carbon Capture Plant that reduces both CapEx and OpEx by 55% compared to conventional methods is a testament to this. This breakthrough allows industrial emitters to profitably lower their carbon footprint, showcasing Mr. Singh's skill in devising impactful, scalable solutions. Furthermore, EcoFusion's impressive client list, featuring industry leaders like Bharat Petroleum, L&T Infotech, and PowerGrid India, validates the credibility and demand for its technology. Mr. Singh's exceptional ability to cultivate and maintain relationships with such high-profile clients underscores his stellar leadership and the substantial trust he commands within the industry. His profound understanding of carbon capture processes and commitment to transforming complex ideas into viable market solutions have cemented EcoFusion's leadership in this critical field, making substantial contributions to the battle against climate change.

In his role as Product Manager for Core Technologies at Digitize, Mr. Singh played an integral part in enhancing the company’s cutting-edge digital solutions. He spearheaded the development of advanced GenAI technologies for the Digitize Journey Optimizer, integrating sophisticated algorithms and AI-powered features that improved content generation and security. His contributions were instrumental in delivering upgrades that benefitted Digitize’s high-profile clients, such as ePay and ConnectNet. Mr. Singh’s technical expertise and innovative approach were invaluable to Digitize, significantly enhancing its capabilities within the competitive landscape of creative and digital marketing software.

At HealthLink, a prominent $2 billion healthtech company, Mr. Singh made significant strides as a Product Manager by leading the development of innovative healthcare devices that reached over a million users. He successfully guided the creation and scaling of the fitXP Smartwatch and a smart weighing machine, showcasing his proficiency in both hardware research and product management. His work at HealthLink underscores his commitment to advancing healthcare technologies, playing a crucial role in improving patient care and service accessibility through innovative solutions.

Transitioning to fintech, Mr. Singh emerged as the entrepreneurial force behind LeaseFlex. He founded the platform with the mission of making housing more accessible and affordable for low to middle-income renters in India. By introducing machine learning models for predictive insurance and credit risk assessment, he eliminated the traditional security deposit requirement, easing the rental process for thousands. Under his leadership, LeaseFlex attracted 145,000 users and 21,000 paying customers, ultimately leading to its successful acquisition by Digicorp. This venture highlights Mr. Singh’s ability to harness technology for tackling pressing socio-economic challenges, reflecting his dedication to impactful and scalable innovation.

Mr. Rohan Singh's journey in the field of emerging technologies is further underscored by his pioneering contributions across climate tech, fintech, and AI. At EcoFusion, his development of a low-cost, patent-protected decarbonization technology positions him as a leader in climate solutions. His innovative centrifugal packed bed system captures and releases CO2 efficiently, achieving a 1-ton-per-day capture capacity while significantly reducing costs compared to industry standards. This technology, alongside his advanced carbon capture formulations like the AB-DEI and TEAHP04 functionalized monoliths, exemplifies his capacity to integrate scientific creativity with economic viability, driving widespread industry adoption and environmental impact.

At Digitize, Mr. Singh continued to showcase his technical prowess by enhancing their digital marketing suite through advanced GenAI technologies. His work evidences a seamless transition between disciplines, where his AI advancements complement his climate tech pursuits in creating scalable solutions. He developed products such as the Digitize Journey Optimizer and a GenAI-powered multi-lingual API for Digitize Campaign, illustrating his ability to apply AI for real-world applications and improve critical functionalities for major clients.

In his pursuit of technological excellence, Mr. Singh's role at HealthLink demonstrated his ability to scale user-centric healthcare technologies, reaching over a million users with products like the fitXP Smartwatch. His cross-disciplinary work continued at LeaseFlex, where he utilized machine learning to democratize housing affordability through innovative financial products. At LeaseFlex, his AI and data science-driven platform eliminated rental security deposits, making housing more accessible to thousands and proving instrumental in its acquisition by Digicorp.

Beyond these corporate roles, Mr. Singh has extended his influence through judging and mentoring roles in prestigious competitions and incubators like the Greentech Open Focused Clinics and the Innovative India Hackathon organized by the Government of India’s Ministry of Education. His evaluations and guidance at events like the TU Achievement Incubator Panel and for GlobeScience's Journal Nova underscore his dedication to fostering innovation and supporting emerging entrepreneurs. His scientific rigor and commitment to mentorship are recognized globally, evidenced by multiple prestigious awards and accolades.

In addition to these contributions, Mr. Singh has actively participated in various international conferences, presenting his pioneering research findings to the global scientific community. At the International Conference on Industry 4.0 and Advanced Manufacturing at IRE Bengaluru, a leading research university in India, he presented his work on "3D printed UV-Thermal Dual curable biocomposite for carbon-neutral building construction applications," recognized on the IRE International Conference book. His expertise was also highlighted by an invitation from Professor Arjun Desai to present to esteemed audiences from top global universities, including MIT, Stanford, Harvard, HEC Paris, and IIT.

Further showcasing his contributions, Mr. Singh presented his paper titled "High Oxidative Stability of AB-DEI and TEAHP04 functionalized activated carbon monolith for low temperature carbon capture" at the International Conference on Sustainable Energy and Environment (ICSEE 2025) at ITS Pilani Goa, with publication by Springer Science. He also participated in the 9th World Congress on Momentum, Heat and Mass Transfer (MHMT'24), where he presented his research on "Thermal Analysis of the Effect of Non-Newtonian Fluid on the Optimally Spaced Elliptical Cylinder." These engagements demonstrate Mr. Singh's significant contributions to advancing research in sustainable and innovative technologies.

Mr. Rohan Singh's impactful work in emerging technologies has garnered significant recognition, including the NEXT INNOVATION Grant from the Government of India’s Department of Science & Technology (DST) via Innovate Create. This grant is a testament to his ability to develop innovative prototypes with societal and commercial significance. His pioneering efforts were further acknowledged with the Rising Star Award from the India Innovators Forum & Innovators' World, and he was named in InnovateAsia's 30 Under 30 list, underscoring his influence as a leading entrepreneur poised to shape the future of his industry. Complementing these honors is a Letter of Intent to invest from an angel investor, which validates his strategic vision and entrepreneurial acumen, highlighting the confidence placed in his potential to drive transformative ventures. These accolades collectively affirm Mr. Singh’s outstanding leadership and commitment to advancing the fields of climate tech, fintech, and AI.

Overall, I am confident that Mr. Singh will continue to make significant contributions to carbon capture technology and the startup ecosystem as a whole. His extraordinary abilities, coupled with his passion for sustainability and innovation, make him an invaluable asset to any organization or initiative he joins. I wholeheartedly support Mr. Singh's O-1A visa petition and am certain that he will continue to drive positive change and make meaningful advancements in the United States.

Please do not hesitate/ feel free to contact me if you require any further information or clarification.

Very truly yours





Rahul Raman
CEO
Zenith Ventures
[email contact here]
